text: Event log (.gsd/log.jsonl, committed) as source of truth; SQLite as gitignored derived cache
why: committed sqlite binary is unmergeable; append-only jsonl + merge=union is conflict-free

text: Random 4-char ID suffix (T-x7k2) instead of sequence numbers
why: two branches minting IDs concurrently can never collide on the next number

text: Last-write-wins by event timestamp for concurrent edits
why: simple, deterministic; worst case with clock skew is briefly stale status — acceptable stakes

text: Agent-explicit writes via skill, not hooks
why: harness-independent; the skill teaches the protocol

title: v1 core: CLI + event log + sqlite cache + skill
Stale detection cross-checked against git log
Task title/deps editing via task_updated event
